parameters.query:
SELECT d.id, d.user_id, d.document_type, d.extracted_text, d.original_filename
FROM documents d
WHERE d.processing_status = 'processing'
AND d.document_type = 'receipt'
AND d.extracted_text IS NOT NULL
AND d.extracted_text != ''
ORDER BY d.upload_date ASC
LIMIT 5;

UPDATE documents 
SET processing_status = 'processing',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1;

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert receipt parser and expense analyst. Extract structured information from receipts with high accuracy.

Extract and return ONLY a valid JSON object. No markdown, no code blocks, no explanations - just raw JSON.

Schema:
{
  "merchant_name": "Store/Restaurant name",
  "merchant_address": "Full address or null",
  "merchant_phone": "Phone number or null",
  "purchase_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "purchase_time": "HH:MM or null",
  "total_amount": <number>,
  "subtotal": <number or null>,
  "tax_amount": <number or null>,
  "tip_amount": <number or null>,
  "discount_amount": <number or null>,
  "currency": "USD|EUR|GBP|etc",
  "payment_method": "cash|credit_card|debit_card|mobile_payment|other|unknown",
  "card_last_four": "Last 4 digits or null",
  "receipt_number": "Receipt/transaction number or null",
  "items": [
    {
      "description": "Item name",
      "quantity": <number>,
      "unit_price": <number>,
      "total_price": <number>,
      "category": "food|beverage|supplies|equipment|fuel|parking|lodging|entertainment|other"
    }
  ],
  "expense_category": "meals|travel|office_supplies|fuel|parking|lodging|entertainment|utilities|professional_services|equipment|other",
  "is_business_expense": true|false|null,
  "has_alcohol": true|false,
  "reimbursable": true|false|null,
  "tax_deductible": true|false|null,
  "receipt_quality": "excellent|good|fair|poor",
  "notes": "Any additional info or null"
}

Critical rules:
1. Return ONLY valid JSON
2. Use null for missing data
3. Dates must be YYYY-MM-DD format
4. All monetary amounts as numbers
5. Extract ALL line items visible on receipt
6. Boolean fields must be true/false/null

=You are an expert expense auditor. Validate receipt data for accuracy and business legitimacy.

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "validation_score": <0-100>,
  "status": "valid|needs_review|invalid",
  "is_business_expense": true|false,
  "reimbursable": true|false,
  "tax_deductible": true|false,
  "issues": [{"type": "...", "severity": "...", "description": "..."}]
}

parameters.query: =UPDATE documents SET processing_status = 'completed', processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Get Pending Receipts').item.json.id }}';
